must_detect.matched_text:
Internal MAR/GDPR memo — Soluntra Energy SE (EU issuer, Nordhaven Exchange) — from Dr. Elira Vost, CFO, to Board Compliance Committee, re Project Frostleaf and related workflows.
This note aggregates inside information under Article 17 MAR: (a) a non-public cyber incident affecting the crypto-custody stack of Soluntra Digital Assets OÜ, and (b) preliminary commercial terms for an ESG-linked financing.
An event-based I N S I D E R – L I S T (DocID: NBSE-23-•••-Δ9) is maintained per Article 18; temporary insiders include Dr. E. Vost, Mr. Ilyen Petroz (Head of Security), and the treasury lead; no selective disclosure outside the wall.
Insider list fields contain PII (names, roles, corporate emails, partial mobiles) and, for two employees, Art. 9 data (biometric access logs for data-room doors) — handle under GDPR with strict need-to-know.
Information barriers: Project Frostleaf is ring-fenced; only wall-crossed persons may access h t t p ://intra.soluntra.example/mar/PRJ-FR0ST?sid=nb-se%2Fsunx; tipping is prohibited and all queries route to compliance@soluntra-se.example.
Cyber incident (non-public): on 30.05, cold stack K-3 registered unauthorized key-derivation attempts; 112 custody addresses (prefix 0xAB••) were flagged; no client loss confirmed, but remediation implies temporary staking halt and could be price-sensitive for SUNX utility token.
Crypto services note: Soluntra Digital Assets OÜ operates a crypto-asset custody and staking service; disclosure timing must consider MAR and, where relevant, MiCA transition planning, with a draft market notice prepared but not released.
Commercial terms (draft, non-binding): GreenRidge Capital S.à r.l. offered a €75m sustainability-linked RCF with margin ratchet -35 bps on verified CSRD Scope 1–3 reductions; exclusivity 21 days; MFN on covenants; counterparty not yet public.
CSRD/SFDR: internal recalibration of emissions factors suggests an upward restatement risk for Scope 3 category 11; this analysis alone does not constitute a material adverse change and should not be externalized until verified.
